response.justification: Despite broad engineering experience, the candidate shows minimal direct exposure to JVM ecosystems, enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — key requirements for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, DLang, Node.js, and web/mobile apps, with only a passing mention of Java in old roles and no evidence of deep JVM, build tool, or IDE subsystem expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems-level programming experience across multiple languages
Proven track record in open-source tooling and developer-focused projects
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: Lacks demonstrable deep expertise in Java/Kotlin, Spring, or JVM internals
No evidence of experience with enterprise IDEs, language servers, or code analysis tooling
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, DLang, Node.js) is misaligned with JVM-focused role
